summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of Phase 4 features: Mobile hero arrows hidden, compact notification bar, WhatsApp floating button, newsletter signup, allergen tags, FAQ page, Gallery page, postcode checker, menu search, More dropdown. All 35+ tests passed. All 12 routes functional.
critical_code_review_comments: Mobile hero arrows correctly hidden using 'hidden sm:flex' class - no text overlap on mobile
Notification bar shows compact version on mobile: 'Now serving Milton Keynes, Edinburgh & Glasgow | Free Delivery £30+'
WhatsApp floating button visible on all pages, links to wa.me/442012345678 correctly
Newsletter signup in footer works: email input + Subscribe button, changes to 'Subscribed!' for 4 seconds after submit
Allergen tags (nuts, dairy, sesame) displayed on trending dishes that have allergens - 4 dishes show tags
FAQ page has hero, search bar filters 18 questions, accordion expand/collapse works, 5 categories present
Gallery page has hero, 6 category filters (All/Kitchen/Svadista/Prasada/Breakfast/Snacks), 12 images, lightbox opens/closes correctly
Postcode checker works: MK=Milton Keynes, EH=Edinburgh, G+digit=Glasgow, other=Rest of UK (Snacks only)
Delivery areas table shows all 4 areas with postcodes, fees, and timing
Gallery preview on homepage shows 8 images with 'View Full Gallery' link to /gallery
Menu page has search bar above category filters, searching filters dishes by name/description
Header 'More' dropdown contains Gallery, FAQ, Contact links
All pages have consistent 32px notification bar offset (header top: 32px)
seed_data_creation: All data is MOCKED in /app/frontend/src/mockData.js including deliveryAreas, faqData, galleryImages, allergens on dishes
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 4 features fully tested. Mobile hero arrows hidden, compact notification bar on mobile, WhatsApp button on all pages, newsletter signup works, allergen tags on dishes, FAQ page with search and accordion, Gallery page with filters and lightbox, postcode checker with 4 delivery areas, menu search bar, More dropdown with Gallery/FAQ/Contact. All 12 routes functional. All data MOCKED.

mobile_hero_arrows_hidden.details: Hero prev/next arrows use 'hidden sm:flex' class. On mobile (390px), arrows are not visible. On desktop, arrows are visible.

mobile_notification_bar_compact.details: Mobile shows: 'Now serving Milton Keynes, Edinburgh & Glasgow | Free Delivery £30+'. Desktop shows full version with 'Swagatam!' prefix.

whatsapp_floating_button.details: Green WhatsApp button visible in bottom-right on all 12 pages. Links to wa.me/442012345678 with pre-filled message.

footer_newsletter.details: Newsletter form in footer with email input and Subscribe button. After submit, button text changes to 'Subscribed!' for 4 seconds.

allergen_tags_on_dishes.details: 4 trending dishes show allergen tags: Pulihora (nuts), Natu Kodi Biriyani (dairy), Gutti Vankaya (nuts, sesame), Sakkarai Pongal (dairy, nuts)

faq_page.details: Hero with 'Frequently Asked Questions' title. Search bar filters 18 questions. 5 categories: Ordering & Delivery, Subscriptions (Dabba Wala), Food & Dietary, Catering & Events, Payment & General. Accordion expand/collapse works.

gallery_page.details: Hero with 'Gallery' title. 6 category filters (All/Kitchen/Svadista/Prasada/Breakfast/Snacks). 12 images in grid. Lightbox opens on image click, closes on X or backdrop click.

postcode_checker.details: Input field + Check button. MK prefix = Milton Keynes (Full Menu + Subscriptions). EH prefix = Edinburgh. G+digit = Glasgow. Other = Rest of UK (Snacks & Pickles only).

delivery_areas_table.details: Shows 4 areas: Milton Keynes (Main), Edinburgh, Glasgow, Rest of UK. Each with postcodes, delivery fee, min order, timing.

gallery_preview_homepage.details: 8 images in grid on homepage. 'View Full Gallery' link navigates to /gallery.

menu_search_bar.details: Search bar above category filters on /menu. Searching 'biriyani' filters from 20 to 2 dishes. Clearing search restores all 20 dishes.

header_more_dropdown.details: More dropdown in header contains Gallery, FAQ, Contact links with correct navigation.

consistent_32px_offset.details: Header has top: 32px on all pages for consistent notification bar offset.

pages_tested.notes: Hero slider, postcode checker, gallery preview, allergen tags, newsletter, WhatsApp button
Hero, search bar, 5 categories, accordion expand/collapse
Search bar above filters, 7 category filters, 20 dishes

mocked_data_note: ALL DATA IS MOCKED in /app/frontend/src/mockData.js - No backend API calls. Includes deliveryAreas, faqData, galleryImages, allergens on featuredDishes.
